heading: Incorrect Connection String Format
body:
The [connection string format](manual/reference/connection-string)
you use to connect to Atlas depends on several factors, including:

- Your [mongosh](mongodb-shell) version. To learn more, see
  Connect to a Cluster via mongosh.

- Your driver version. To learn more, see Connect to a Cluster via Client Libraries.

Verify your connection string in a test environment before putting
it into production.
